A user with READ and CREATE permission, but no UPDATE permission for a team folder can rename files in the team folder. 

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Team Folders (also known as Groupfolders) app is updated.

- Nextcloud 33: Team Folders 21.0.4
- Nextcloud 32: Team Folders 20.1.11
- Nextcloud 31: Team Folders 19.1.16
- Nextcloud 30: Team Folders 18.1.12
- Nextcloud 29: Team Folders 17.0.15


### Workarounds

<!-- Remove not applicable sections -->

* Disable Team Folders app

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3540673)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/groupfolders/pull/4361)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wx2x-822r-rvmf", "html_url":
